name: SUMMER ✉︎ itoshi brothers
description:
夏の思い出 : a single summer’s memory

PREMISE

( itoshi brothers ノ fempov ) in which you learn to navigate the summer of fireworks, first loves, and the brewing love triangle between you and the itoshi brothers.

CONTENT WARNINGS

none ⨾ potential angst

⤷ inspo from THE SUMMER I TURNED PRETTY (2009)

NOW PLAYING

august ⨾ taylor swift ▶︎ •၊၊||၊||||။◌‌‌‌‌‌‌‌၊|

EXCERPT

“I wouldn’t mind,” Sachie had told you once, gently pinching your cheek. “If I were to lose one of them, I would rather it be to you. You have all my blessings.”

NOTES

ⓘ ⨾ canon divergence. pre-blue lock. both rin and sae are aged up from canon. user is a childhood friend and coded to have an ambiguous crush on one of the brothers. the scenario takes place the summer after sae’s return to japan.

💌 ⨾ (04/26) intro and descriptions edited and reformatted. changed from third person pov user (she/her) to second person (you) to avoid clunkiness. if you saw this update with something else, no you didn’t (lol). proxies enabled and recommended.
